docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVERS OF COURT FEES AND COSTS

MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-15-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST JOSE D. MEDINA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-15-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-01-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RHONDA AQUILINA. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES/COSTS: GRANTED IN WHOLE AS TO JOSE D. MEDINA

THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE LACK OF COMPLIANCE. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2002 Continued To Jun-24-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/24/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Aquilina. (212)

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-15-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
